channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Asian shares track Wall Street to record highs but higher oil prices a risk
item.description: Japan and South Korea markets reached record highs, with the Nikkei topping 30,000. Markets in Japan, South Korea and Taiwan vaulted to record highs for a second day, with the Nikkei topping the 60,000 mark.

item.title: Trump targets NATO allies over Iran war support
item.description: Trump targeted NATO allies over Iran war support, creating a list. 'Naughty and nice list': Trump targets NATO allies over Iran war support. Report WION.

item.title: Reported Seizure of Ships Injects New Uncertainty Over Peace Talks
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guards seized two ships near the Strait of Hormuz. Iran’s Revolutionary Guards said they had seized two ships near the Strait of Hormuz. A Trump spokeswoman said the president did not view those actions as violating the cease-fire.

item.title: US intercepts three Iranian oil tankers in Asian waters, sources say
item.description: The US intercepted three Iranian oil tankers near India, Malaysia, and Sri Lanka. At least three Iranian-flagged tankers have been redirected from their positions near India, Malaysia and Sri Lanka, shipping and security sources said.

item.title: Trump creates 'naughty or nice' list for allies over their role in Iran war
item.description: Trump created a list for allies over their role in the Iran war. Trump creates 'naughty or nice' list for allies over their role in Iran war India Today.

item.title: US Navy chief out as Iran seizes 2 ships amid Hormuz blockade: Live updates
item.description: Iran seized two ships amid a Hormuz blockade, and the US Navy chief is out. US Navy chief out as Iran seizes 2 ships amid Hormuz blockade: Live updates USA Today.

item.title: US and Iran in blockade stalemate; Erdogan says war ‘starting to weaken Europe’
item.description: US and Iran are in a stalemate over a blockade. Turkish President Erdogan said the war is "starting to weaken Europe". The situation remains tense with no resolution in sight.

item.title: Chemical leak at U.S. plant kills two, sends 19 more to hospital: Officials
item.description: A chemical leak at a US plant killed two people and sent 19 others to the hospital. The leak involved a reaction between nitric acid and another substance. Officials are investigating the incident.

item.title: Trump weighs consequences for some NATO allies over Iran war
item.description: US President Trump is considering consequences for some NATO allies regarding their stance on the Iran war. The move could impact the alliance's dynamics. Trump's decision is pending. Trump weighs consequences for some NATO allies over Iran war LiveNOW from FOX.

item.title: Iran war news, Trump says there is ‘no time frame’ on Iran war and denies midterms driving decisions
item.description: Trump stated there is no time frame for a potential Iran war. He denied that midterm elections are driving his decisions. Live updates: Iran war news, Trump says there is ‘no time frame’ on Iran war and denies midterms driving decisions CNN.

item.title: U.S. Navy Secretary John Phelan fired by Pentagon
item.description: US Navy Secretary John Phelan was fired by the Pentagon. Mr. Phelan's departure also comes just weeks after Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth fired the Army's top officer, Gen. Randy George, as well as two other top generals in the Army.

item.title: Three Ships Attacked in Strait of Hormuz, Escorting Two to Its Coast
item.description: Three ships were attacked in the Strait of Hormuz, with two escorted to the Iranian coast. The incident occurred in a vital waterway for global oil shipments. Authorities are investigating the attacks.

item.title: Iran attacks ships in Strait of Hormuz as thousands more U.S. forces head for Middle East
item.description: Iran attacked ships in the Strait of Hormuz. Thousands of additional US forces are heading to the Middle East in response. The situation in the region is escalating. Live Updates: Iran attacks ships in Strait of Hormuz as thousands more U. S.

item.title: Oil prices edge lower with no progress on US-Iran talks, Hormuz shipping still disrupted
item.description: Oil prices edged lower due to a lack of progress in US-Iran talks. Shipping in the Strait of Hormuz remains disrupted. The market is monitoring developments in the region. Oil prices edge lower with no progress on US-Iran talks, Hormuz shipping still disrupted.

item.title: Iran fires on 2 ships in Strait of Hormuz after Trump extends ceasefire
item.description: Iran fired on two ships in the Strait of Hormuz after US President Trump extended a ceasefire. The incident occurred despite a fragile truce between Iran and the US. Iran fires on 2 ships in Strait of Hormuz after Trump extends ceasefire Fox News.

item.title: Iran releases video of IRGC seizing ship in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard released a video showing its forces seizing a ship in the Strait of Hormuz. The video appears to show Iranian forces boarding the vessel. Iran’s revolutionary guard has released a video said to show its forces seizing a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: UK, France agree 3‑year deal to curb Channel crossings
item.description: The UK and France agreed to a three-year deal to curb Channel crossings. Funding will be halted after one year if France fails to meet migrant reduction targets. For the first time, the deal links some UK payments to France to performance in stopping migrants.

item.title: Iran says won't reopen Hormuz as long as U.S. blockade remains
item.description: Iran seized two ships attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz and has not decided on joining new US talks. Iran Guards say 'seized' two ships attempting to cross Strait of Hormuz; Iran says it has yet to decide whether to join a new round of talks with the U. S.

item.title: Turkey Votes To Ban Social Media For Under-15s
item.description: Turkey's parliament voted to ban social media for under-15s. Under the new law, minors will be prohibited from creating social media accounts. Under the law, under-15s will be banned from creating accounts on social media.

item.title: Iran Says Won't Reopen Hormuz As Long As US Blockade Remains
item.description: Iran will not reopen the Strait of Hormuz while a US blockade remains in place. Iran said that reopening the Strait of Hormuz is not possible. Iran Says Won't Reopen Hormuz As Long As US Blockade Remains.
